inputs.name: CRP_RESTORE_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON
safetyConstraints: Attestation file must be sanitized JSON.
Attestation must be nonInteractive:true and machineAttested:true.
Attestation must not be generated manually.
Attestation must not be simulated-only for production proof.
Restore target must be isolated from production.
RPO, RTO, post-restore auth/session, packet PDF, response queue, cleanup/lifecycle, rollback/stop, and target destruction checks must pass.
No secrets, PII, signed URLs, raw report text, or raw report bytes may appear.

failureIfMissing.message: machine attestation path was not provided.

inputs.name: CRP_PRODUCTION_WORKER_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON
safetyConstraints: Attestation file must be sanitized JSON.
Attestation must be nonInteractive:true and machineAttested:true.
Attestation must not be generated manually.
Attestation must not be simulated-only for production proof.
Runtime proof must be bounded by max jobs.
Only synthetic or canary queue behavior may be processed.
Queue depth before/after, liveness, processed/failed/dead-letter/stale counts, worker stop/rollback, and canary cleanup checks must pass.
No secrets, PII, signed URLs, raw report text, raw report bytes, or artifact contents may appear.

failureIfMissing.message: machine attestation path was not provided.

inputs.name: CRP_RAW_REPORT_MACHINE_INVENTORY_ATTESTATION_JSON
safetyConstraints: Attestation file must be sanitized JSON.
Attestation must be nonInteractive:true and machineAttested:true.
Reliable DB connectivity must be proven without printing connection details.
Only aggregate counts, opaque IDs, or hashes may appear.
Unresolved counts and remediation candidate counts must be recorded.
No secrets, PII, signed URLs, raw report text, raw report bytes, account numbers, or database URLs may appear.

failureIfMissing.message: machine attestation path was not provided.

inputs.name: CRP_RAW_REPORT_MACHINE_REMEDIATION_ATTESTATION_JSON
safetyConstraints: Proof script itself must not apply remediation or mutate storage.
Attestation file must be sanitized JSON.
Attestation must be nonInteractive:true and machineAttested:true.
Reliable DB connectivity and accepted sanitized inventory must be proven.
Remediation policy, unresolved count, remediated count, rollback/recovery notes, and opaque hash-only evidence checks must pass.
No secrets, PII, signed URLs, raw report text, raw report bytes, account numbers, or database URLs may appear.

failureIfMissing.message: machine attestation path was not provided.

inputs.name: CRP_ALERTING_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON
safetyConstraints: Attestation file must be sanitized JSON.
Attestation must be nonInteractive:true and machineAttested:true.
Live proof must use a safe synthetic alert and sanitized channel/correlation identifiers.
Formal exclusion proof is accepted only when repo policy explicitly permits certifying exclusion.
Machine-verifiable acknowledgement may be used; operator acknowledgement is not required.
No webhook URLs, tokens, secrets, PII, signed URLs, raw report text, or raw report bytes may appear.

failureIfMissing.message: machine attestation path was not provided.

inputs.name: CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON
safetyConstraints: Attestation file must be sanitized JSON.
Attestation must be nonInteractive:true and machineAttested:true.
Attestation must not be simulated-only for production proof.
Only a safe archive candidate or synthetic/canary retention record may be used.
Archive selection or creation, isolated restore target, integrity, cleanup, rollback/recovery notes, and target destruction checks must pass.
No secrets, PII, signed URLs, raw report text, raw report bytes, or artifact contents may appear.

failureIfMissing.message: machine attestation path was not provided.

repoConfigRequirements.name: migration-governance-ledger-without-temporary-allowlist-residuals
safetyConstraints: Migration machine proof must be static and non-mutating.
No active temporary runtime ensure allowlist residuals may remain.
No expired allowlist entries may remain.
No release-blocking migration governance findings may remain.

failureIfMissing.message: migration gate remains non-certifying while temporary allowlist residuals are release-blocking.
